slices.title: operator_decision_recorded signed ledger event kind
slices.objective: Add the signed operator_decision_recorded L0 event kind (kind.rs, payload, canonicalize, replay no-op arm, round-trip + canonicalize tests, typeshare TS union, byte-stable fixtures) as the shared trust infra both the approval inbox and the loop authorization envelope consume. Hand-built build-time prerequisite of the self-build loop.
acceptanceCriteria: A signed operator_decision_recorded event round-trips and canonicalizes byte-stably across Rust and TypeScript.
bp-replay carries an exhaustive no-op arm for the new kind so no sibling crate match silently breaks.

slices.title: Storage read surface and Tier-1 acceptance-shadow
slices.objective: Add the read surface for Mission Control: a single aggregating listRunsByStatus with cursor pagination, a Tier-1 acceptance-shadow set when the M4 gate records acceptance, listPendingOperatorDecisions for the inbox feed, and parentRunId surfaced end to end through the inspect snapshot.
verificationCommands: pnpm -C . exec vitest run packages/storage/test packages/kernel/test
acceptanceCriteria: listRunsByStatus filters by status and paginates with a cursor via one aggregating query.
A run with a matching operator_decision_recorded row is excluded from the pending-decisions feed; a passed acceptance-shadow run with no decision is included.
inspect on a child run reports a non-null parentRunId.

slices.title: Extract createInspectorProjection to the kernel
slices.objective: Move createInspectorProjection into the kernel re-expressed against the strict InspectSnapshot type (no loose Like interfaces), re-export it from the kernel, and have the CLI formatter import it with behavior unchanged.
verificationCommands: pnpm -C . exec vitest run packages/kernel/test apps/cli/test
acceptanceCriteria: createInspectorProjection accepts the strict InspectSnapshot and defines or imports no Like type.
Existing CLI inspector tests stay green importing the projection from the kernel.

slices.title: OperatorDecisionPort and orchestrator.recordOperatorDecision
slices.objective: Add the sole writer of the operator_decision_recorded tape fact with write-ahead ordering: validate run state, emit and flush the signed event before the side effect, drive the resume or merge or quarantine side effect, and idempotently re-drive a decided-but-unexecuted decision exactly once on startup.
verificationCommands: pnpm -C . exec vitest run packages/kernel/test test/ledger-integration
acceptanceCriteria: The signed event is emitted and flushed before the irreversible side effect; a crash between flush-ack and side effect resumes the side effect exactly once with no double-merge.
recordOperatorDecision validates decision and subject and ID shape before emit so malformed values can never be signed.
A golden canonical-bytes plus sha256 fixture pins byte-stability for an approved/merge and a rejected/resume case.

slices.title: mission-control-server HTTP read and write API
slices.objective: Add a new private mission-control-server package exposing a node http typed router over the kernel and storage read surface plus a token-gated decision write endpoint, bound to loopback by default, with the package registered in the workspace aliases and the optional-internal-packages bootstrap list.
acceptanceCriteria: Each read endpoint returns the expected shape against a mock store and the decision endpoint 401s without a valid token and calls recordOperatorDecision exactly once on success.
The default bind is loopback and the published-bootstrap snapshot does not require the server's dist.

slices.title: Web Run Inspector UI
slices.objective: Add a new Vite web SPA Run Inspector that renders only InspectorProjection fields across the event timeline, evidence pane, and outcome strip plus a run list, reusing the projection's fail-closed verdict with no verdict logic in the UI.
verificationCommands: pnpm -C . exec vitest run apps/web/test packages/kernel/test
acceptanceCriteria: Each panel renders from a fixture InspectorProjection and the outcome strip shows BLOCKED for a missing-evidence fixture.
The kernel test suite stays green after the web app is added (node-env tests unperturbed).

slices.title: Web Approval Inbox UI
slices.objective: Add the web Approval Inbox that lists the pending feed for resume and merge flows with inspector links, posts approve and reject decisions to the API, and surfaces an optimistic-concurrency conflict explicitly instead of silently succeeding.
acceptanceCriteria: The inbox renders both the resume and merge flows and approve/reject calls the API with the correct decision and subject.
A conflict response renders an explicit error rather than a success.

slices.title: bp web subcommand and build/CI/bootstrap wiring
slices.objective: Add the bp web subcommand that lazy-imports the mission-control-server, injects the ledger-backed OperatorDecisionPort, serves the web build output with a no-listen self-test mode and loopback default, and wire the web build into the root build and CI without adding the web app to the root tsconfig references.
acceptanceCriteria: bp web --check exits 0 and binds loopback and the published-bootstrap snapshot stays green with the server in the optional-internal-packages list.
A test asserts apps/web is not in the root tsconfig references and is covered by a tsc noEmit step.
